task.objective: Implement Auto-Quarantine system that automatically quarantines flaky tests based on configurable thresholds, allowing CI to pass while isolating problematic tests for later investigation

existing_patterns.pattern: Database queries use `getQueriesForOrg(organizationId)` wrapper pattern in lib/db.ts
API routes use `export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"` and auth check first
Components use `"use client"`, useState/useEffect for data fetching
Existing test_flakiness_history table tracks flakiness metrics per test
SQL migrations in scripts/ folder with sequential numbering

dependencies.dependency: lucide-react - for icons (Shield, ShieldOff, AlertTriangle, Clock, History)
shadcn/ui components - for UI elements (Dialog, Table, Badge, Button)

functional.requirement: Create quarantine rules table with configurable thresholds per organization
Auto-quarantine tests when flaky rate exceeds threshold (default 30%)
Quarantined tests status reported separately (don't fail CI overall)
Display quarantine badge on test cards and result views
Admin page to view, manage, and release quarantined tests
Track quarantine history (when quarantined, released, by whom)
Auto-release tests when flaky rate drops below release threshold
GitHub issue auto-creation for quarantined tests

non_functional.requirement: Quarantine check should not add latency to test result ingestion
All data must be filtered by organization_id (multi-tenancy)
Only admins/owners can manually quarantine or release tests

file.description: SQL migration to create quarantine tables
Create API endpoint for quarantine management
Create API endpoint for individual test quarantine actions
Create API endpoint for quarantine rules management
Create quarantine badge component for test cards
Create quarantine management component for admin page

constraints.avoid: Don't block test ingestion while checking quarantine status - do it async
Don't quarantine tests with fewer than minRunsForQuarantine runs
Don't allow viewers to quarantine or release tests - admin only
constraints.prefer: Use soft status changes (quarantined/released) instead of deleting records
Keep full audit history of all quarantine actions
Follow existing glass-card styling and color patterns

output_format.code: Implement each file following the code snippets provided
output_format.explanation: Implementation notes: 1. Run migration first to create quarantine tables 2. Default rules are created on first access if none exist 3. Auto-quarantine can be triggered via POST /api/quarantine or scheduled cron 4. The quarantine badge can be added to test-result-card.tsx 5. Add navigation link to /dashboard/quarantine in sidebar
